       target.name, 
       target.amenity, 
       ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) AS distance

ORDER BY distance ASC 
LIMIT 1;

question: I am so stressed, where can I find a calm place?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM campus_places WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND (leisure ILIKE '%park%' OR leisure ILIKE '%garden%' OR amenity ILIKE '%library%') ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 5;
pred_sql: WITH RelaxationPlaces AS ( SELECT name, amenity FROM campus_places WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND leisure ILIKE '%park%' OR amenity ILIKE '%library%' ), NearestPlace AS ( SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name, ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) as distance FROM RelaxationPlaces target JOIN campus_places ref ON ST_DWithin(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography, 500) ORDER BY distance ASC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT * FROM NearestPlace;
raw_pred_sql:
WITH RelaxationPlaces AS (
    SELECT name, amenity 
    FROM campus_places 
    WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND leisure ILIKE '%park%' OR amenity ILIKE '%library%'
), NearestPlace AS (
    SELECT target.geometry, target.name, target.amenity, ref.geometry AS ref_geom, ref.name AS ref_name, ST_Distance(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography) as distance
    FROM RelaxationPlaces target JOIN campus_places ref ON ST_DWithin(target.geometry::geography, ref.geometry::geography, 500)
    ORDER BY distance ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT * FROM NearestPlace;

WITH calm_places AS (
    SELECT name, amenity 
    FROM campus_places 
    WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND amenity ILIKE '%library%' OR leisure ILIKE '%park%' OR historic ILIKE '%manor%' OR tourism ILIKE '%artwork%'
), engineering_college AS (
    SELECT geometry 
    FROM campus_places 
    WHERE building = 'university=department' AND official_name ILIKE '%engineering college%'
)
SELECT ST_Distance(calm_places.geometry::geography, engineering_college.geometry::geography) as distance, calm_places.name, calm_places.amenity

ORDER BY distance ASC
LIMIT 1;
